# Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New connector / data source
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] I've run `npm run dev` and the app starts cleanly
- [ ] I've manually tested the change end-to-end
- [ ] Onboarding still completes on a fresh `~/.jurni/` (or not applicable)
- [ ] No new console errors
- [ ] If I changed architecture, I updated `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] If I added a user-facing feature, I updated `README.md` and `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] If I added a new dependency, it's already widely-used (no sketchy packages)
- [ ] My commit messages follow `<area>: <imperative summary>` format
